name: Timbersaw
description: I'm not a lumberjack. This. This is personal. Rizzrack, the Timbersaw The shatters the tree it latched upon Timbersaw reaching it. The tree splinters in all directions, damaging and applying a movement speed slow to affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Exposure Therapy
abilities.description: Timbersaw restores a flat amount of mana per tree destroyed. Now additionally restores a flat amount of health per tree destroyed. Mana Restore per Destroyed Tree: 4/6/8/10. Heal per Destroyed Tree: 10.

abilities.name: Whirling Death
abilities.description: For Universal enemy heroes, the ability reduces a lesser portion of all of their attributes. Radius: 325. Base Damage: 75/120/165/210. Damage Bonus per Tree: 9/16/23/30 (84/91/98/105). Attribute Reduction: 13% (15%). Debuff Duration: 11/12/13/14. All Attributes Reduction: 5% (7%). Cooldown: 7.5/7/6.5/6. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Timber Chain
abilities.description: Fires a chain that embeds itself in the first tree it hits, pulling Timbersaw towards it. Deals damage to enemy units within Timbersaw's travel path. Cast Range: 750/900/1050/1200 (56250/67500/78750/90000). Max Travel Distance: 750/900/1050/1200 (56250/67500/78750/90000). Travel Speed: 2200/2400/2600/2800 (165000/180000/195000/210000). Tree Search Radius: 90. Damage Radius: 225. Damage: 45/100/155/210. Cooldown: 60/70/80/90.

abilities.name: Reactive Armor
abilities.description: Grants bonus armor and bonus health regeneration whenever an enemy hero attacks Timbersaw. The damage barrier explodes when it expires, damaging nearby enemy units corresponding to its current barrier value. Stack per Incoming Attack: 4 (5). Armor Bonus per Stack: 0.4/0.5/0.6/0.7. Health Regen Bonus per Stack: 0.4/0.5/0.6/0.7 (0.65/0.75/0.85/0.95). Stack Duration: 10/12/14/16. Stack per Creep Attack: 1. Effect Radius: (450).

abilities.name: Twisted Chakram
abilities.description: Launches a secondary saw-blade that deals damage and applies movement speed slow on affected enemy units based on their current health it passes through, then returns to Timbersaw. Cast Range: 1200. Effect Radius: 125. Contact Damage: 100/150/200. Min Move Speed Slow Health Threshold: 5%. Min Move Speed Slow: 5% (10%). Max Move Speed Slow: 100%. Cooldown: 20/16/12. Mana Cost: 100/140/180.

abilities.name: Flamethrower
abilities.description: Releases a destructive flame in the direction Timbersaw is facing. Deals damage per second, applies a movement speed slow and destroys trees within an area. First Radius: 0. Flame Length: 400. End Radius: 275. Damage per Second: 70. Move Speed Slow: 30%. Debuff Duration: 2. Mana Cost: 20.

abilities.name: Chakram
abilities.description: Launches a saw-blade that deals damage, applies a movement speed slow, and cuts down trees in its path when launched and retracted. The saw-blade spins in place, deals damage over time, and applies a movement speed slow to enemy units based on their current health within its proximity once it reaches its area-targeted location. Cast Range: 1200. Effect Radius: 200. Max Distance: 2000. Contact Damage: 100/150/200. Contact Slow Duration: 0.5. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Cooldown: 100/140/180. Mana Cost: 14/22/30.
